name: test_vaccination_file_upload_systmone_whitespace_normalization
description:
Test: Upload a SystmOne vaccination records file with extra whitespace and
   verify normalization.
Steps:
1. Upload a SystmOne file with whitespace issues.
Verification:
- Output indicates successful normalization and import.
Scenarios covered:
TwoSpaces, Tabs, NBSP (non-breaking space), ZWJ (zero-width joiner),
HistoricalTwoSpaces, HistoricalTabs, HistoricalNBSP, HistoricalZWJ
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a SystmOne vaccination records file with extra whitespace and
verify normalization.
Steps:

  1. Upload a SystmOne file with whitespace issues.
    Verification:
  • Output indicates successful normalization and import.
    Scenarios covered:
    TwoSpaces, Tabs, NBSP (non-breaking space), ZWJ (zero-width joiner),
    HistoricalTwoSpaces, HistoricalTabs, HistoricalNBSP, HistoricalZWJ

setup_systmone_nivs = None page = test_data = @pytest.mark.vaccinations @pytest.mark.bug def test_vaccination_file_upload_systmone_whitespace_normalization( setup_systmone_nivs, page, test_data, ): """ Test: Upload a SystmOne vaccination records file with extra whitespace and verify normalization. Steps: 1. Upload a SystmOne file with whitespace issues. Verification: - Output indicates successful normalization and import. Scenarios covered: TwoSpaces, Tabs, NBSP (non-breaking space), ZWJ (zero-width joiner), HistoricalTwoSpaces, HistoricalTabs, HistoricalNBSP, HistoricalZWJ """ > ImportRecordsWizardPage(page, testStage.description:
Test: Upload a SystmOne vaccination records file with extra whitespace and
   verify normalization.
Steps:
1. Upload a SystmOne file with whitespace issues.
Verification:
- Output indicates successful normalization and import.
Scenarios covered:
TwoSpaces, Tabs, NBSP (non-breaking space), ZWJ (zero-width joiner),
HistoricalTwoSpaces, HistoricalTabs, HistoricalNBSP, HistoricalZWJ
